flow.purpose: Goal flow. Circuit writes a bounded goal contract, runs one statically authored child flow target, evaluates evidence, runs a two-pass safety review, and closes from typed Goal reports.

stage_path_policy.rationale: Goal supervises a child flow through Frame, Act, Verify, Review, and Close. Analyze and Plan are delegated to the selected static child flow.

blocks.title: Goal - write contract and select static target
Evaluate - compare attempt evidence to done claims

sub_runs.goal: Execute the selected child flow for reports/goal/contract.json. Preserve the operator objective and produce a report-backed proof packet.
